signatures.label: IF condition THEN statements [ELSIF condition THEN statements] [ELSE statements] END_IF

documentation.value: Conditional branching statement. Executes statements if the condition evaluates to TRUE.
A BOOL expression to evaluate
One or more statements to execute when the condition is TRUE

signatures.label: CASE expression OF value1: statements; [value2: statements;] [ELSE statements;] END_CASE

documentation.value: Selects one of several groups of statements depending on the value of an expression.
An integer or enumeration expression to evaluate
A case label followed by statements to execute

signatures.label: FOR variable := start TO end [BY step] DO statements END_FOR

documentation.value: Repeats statements for a counter variable from a start value to an end value.
The loop counter variable (must be an integer type)
The initial value of the counter
The final value of the counter (inclusive)
Optional increment value (default is 1)
Repeats statements as long as the condition evaluates to TRUE.
A BOOL expression evaluated before each iteration
Statements to execute in each iteration
Repeats statements until the condition evaluates to TRUE. Body is executed at least once.
Statements to execute in each iteration
A BOOL expression evaluated after each iteration
Declares a function block - a POU with persistent state between calls. Can have input, output, and internal variables.
The name of the function block
Declares local variables within a POU. Optional qualifiers: CONSTANT for read-only, RETAIN for persistent values.
The variable identifier
The data type (BOOL, INT, REAL, STRING, etc.)
Optional initial value for the variable
Returns the absolute value of a numeric input.
A numeric value (INT, REAL, DINT, LREAL, etc.)
Returns the square root of a real number.
A non-negative REAL or LREAL value
Returns the larger of two numeric values.
The first numeric value
The second numeric value
Returns the smaller of two numeric values.
The first numeric value
The second numeric value
Returns the length of a string in characters.
The input string

signatures.label: MID(str: STRING, length: INT, position: INT): STRING

documentation.value: Returns a substring of the given length starting at the specified position.
The input string
The number of characters to extract
The 1-based starting position
